entity.label: Eliakim
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Abiud, of the posterity of Zerubbabel (Matt. 1:13).

nodes.label: Eliakim
nodes.description: The son of Abiud, of the posterity of Zerubbabel (Matt. 1:13).

nodes.label: Abiud
nodes.description: A descendant of Zerubbabel and father of Eliakim (Matt. 1:13, “Abiud”); called also Juda (Luke 3:26), and Obadiah (1 Chr. 3:21).

verses.text: And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor;
